channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: The cleanup trap: Stop asking RAG to fix bad data
item.description: The enterprise technology ecosystem is caught in a costly cycle. Over the past two years, millions of dollars have been funneled into generative AI pilots, yet many of these initiatives stall out before ever reaching a live production environment.When a project fails, the immediate instinct of technical leadership is often to blame the model: The context window was too restrictive, the latency was too high, or the reasoning capabilities simply were not there.But as data engineers building the scaffolding for these systems, we often see a different reality: The model receives the blame, but the...

item.title: LG’s monitors come with an unwanted addition for Windows: McAfee pop-up ads
item.description: A video from Gamers Nexus explains how, after connecting a new LG UltraGear monitor to a PC running Windows 11 for the first time, Windows Update is silently installing LG driver updates and the LG Monitor App Installer, without so much as a permission pop-up or notification. The app doesn't appear to include special controls […]

item.title: I’ve been using the Asus ROG Strix Scar 18 (2026), and this is the best (and biggest) gaming laptop you can buy right now
item.description: If you have a few thousand burning a hole in your pocket and a gym membership to help you carry it, the Asus ROG Strix SCAR 18 is the most powerful gaming laptop money can buy.

item.title: 'This one was different from anything we had handled before': Hugging Face confirms it was hit by cyberattack powered by an AI agent
item.description: There's a new twist to the old code injection attack, and this one comes with AI seasoning.

item.title: Attention si vous utilisez 7-Zip : une faille permet de prendre le contrôle de votre ordinateur
item.description: Une faille de sécurité dans 7-Zip permet l’exécution de code à distance lorsqu’une archive malveillante est téléchargée puis extraite. Les utilisateurs doivent installer la version 26.02 pour corriger cette vulnérabilité.

item.title: Sleepy Hollow is getting a reboot from Sony — and an unexpected Euphoria star is reportedly leading the cast
item.description: Sydney Sweeney is reportedly going to lead the cast of a new Sleepy Hollow reimagining. Here's what we know so far.

item.title: Adobe’s ‘natural look’ camera app embraces generative AI
item.description: Adobe's experimental camera app has taken an unexpected turn. After Project Indigo was launched last year to provide a "more natural (SLR-like) look" for iPhone photography, the Indigo camera app is now being updated with a suite of generative AI tools. And the change doesn't rely upon Adobe's own Firefly AI models. Adobe describes the […]

item.title: 'Update your app' — Private Internet Access finally breaks its silence with a wave of network upgrades
item.description: Private Internet Access (PIA) is rolling out network infrastructure updates to improve routing, reconnections, and reduce CAPTCHAs. Here's what's changing and why you should update.

item.title: 'A well-balanced and genuinely impressive home and office mini PC': The Geekom A5 Pro with Ryzen 5 gets a big price cut
item.description: The diminutive desktop, with an AMD Ryzen 5 processor, 16GB of RAM and a 1TB SSD gets big price cut at Amazon.

item.title: Safety guardrails blocked Hugging Face's defenders, not the attacker, when an AI agent breached its systems
item.description: Hugging Face’s incident response team first turned to frontier AI models to analyze a breach of the company’s production infrastructure, and the models refused to help. Commercial safety guardrails built to stop attackers blocked every forensic query because they treated the IR team’s real exploit data the same way they would treat a live attack.The attacker, an autonomous AI agent running the campaign end to end, moved laterally across the Hugging Face infrastructure for a weekend, undetected and unstopped.Security leaders are quick to recognize the pattern and diagnose what went wrong. “I’ve...

item.title: Fin des soldes : c’est le moment d’acheter votre vélo ou trottinette électrique avant la rentrée
item.description: Si trouver un vélo électrique endurant ou une trottinette sécurisante sans y laisser un demi-salaire relève souvent du défi, la fin de l'événement réserve encore d'excellentes surprises. Avec les soldes qui se terminent demain, c'est donc l'ultime opportunité de vous équiper à moindre coût avant la rentrée. Découvrez notre sélection des meilleures offres à saisir in extremis ! ...

item.title: Adobe camera app’s new feature will critique your photos using AI
item.description: Adobe's Project Indigo can now remove all kinds of backgrounds from photos you snap using the app

item.title: Pourquoi cette batterie externe Ugreen de 10 000 mAh et 55 W à -40 % va plaire à tout le monde cet été ?
item.description: Avec son câble USB-C et ses deux ports de charge, cette Ugreen Nexode Pro de 55 W est un objet qui plaira à tout le monde. En ce moment, elle chute à 35,98 euros au lieu de 59,99 euros sur Amazon.

item.title: I loved this portable DIY 35mm film scanner with built-in light, and it could save me a lot of money — but it’s not as simple as it sounds
item.description: I have fallen in love with this scanner, but its equipment requirements mean it's not for everyone.

item.title: ShinyHunters hit medial giant Abbott, disrupting cancer drug research and more
item.description: Abbott suffers two attacks in the same week, and at least one is demanding a ransom payment.

item.title: Hackers are exploiting recently patched WordPress bugs, putting millions of websites at risk
item.description: Two critical security flaws in WordPress’ software have given hackers the chance to remotely take over tens of millions of websites, according to an estimate by a cybersecurity researcher.

item.title: Google repousse la sortie de sa plus puissante IA : ce gros défaut qui bloque tout en interne
item.description: Attendu pour juin 2026, le surpuissant modèle d'intelligence artificielle Gemini 3.5 Pro de Google accuse un sérieux retard. En interne, ses lacunes en programmation informatique inquiètent.

item.title: Soldes d’été 2026 : les meilleures offres casques, écouteurs et enceintes avant la fin de la dernière démarque
item.description: Plus que quelques jours pour profiter des soldes d'été et refaire votre équipement audio à moindre coût ! Casques de référence, écouteurs True Wireless et enceintes nomades affichent d'excellents prix pour la dernière démarque.

item.title: How long is a new iPhone actually supposed to last?
item.description: Apple devices tend to be pretty durable, and the average lifespan of a new iPhone seems to be fairly consistent.

item.title: The new, wide Galaxy Z Fold 8 revealed by BTS member J-Hope
item.description: BTS's J-Hope was filmed using Samsung's unreleased Galaxy Z Fold 8 Wide on tour, offering an early look at the unreleased foldable.

item.title: Save $640 on Samsungs 870 EVO 2TB internal SSD
item.description: Upgrade your PC storage with a 2TB Samsung 870 EVO internal SSD, currently on sale for $399.99 at Amazon.

item.title: YouTube clarifies policies around AI slop and upsetting videos
item.description: YouTube has updated its monetization policies to more clearly define the kinds of AI-generated and low-quality videos that can’t earn ad revenue.

item.title: This new, Beijing-based AI model is causing such a stir that subscriptions are now on hold
item.description: Chinese startup Moonshot AI says new subscriptions have been temporarily suspended due to overwhelming demand. The new, powerful Chinese artificial intelligence model Kimi K3, which has caused a stir in the U.S. tech industry, has suspended new subscriptions after a flood in demand overwhelmed capacity within days of the launch.The development highlighted challenges faced by Chinese AI models in serving a growing user base at home and abroad at a time the U.S.-China tech race is heating up.Chinese open-source, lower-cost advanced AI models, including DeepSeek’s latest V4, have been moving fast...

item.title: Little House on the Prairie star teases first details of season 2's On the Banks of Plum Creek adaptation as production begins — 'It's going to be very exciting'
item.description: Little House on the Prairie season 2 was renewed before we even saw season 1 — and now that production is underway, one star has hinted what's to come in new episodes.

item.title: Soldes d’été : voici les 8 ultimes bons plans gaming à saisir avant demain
item.description: Avis aux joueuses et aux joueurs : les soldes d'été touchent à leur fin ! Mais avant le clap de fin définitif, il reste encore de très belles opportunités à saisir au rayon gaming. Des consoles de jeux incontournables aux PC portables taillés pour les jeux AAA, sans oublier les manettes. Découvrez toutes les offres pour vous équiper au meilleur prix avant qu'il ne soit trop tard ! ...

item.title: Inference startup Infinity raises $15M from Touring Capital, OpenAI and Athropic researchers
item.description: AI infrastructure company Infinity announced Monday a $15 million raise at a $100 million valuation from investors including Touring Capital, Principal VC, and researchers from companies such as OpenAI and Anthropic.

item.title: Avengers: Doomsday finally has a real trailer
item.description: After too many weird teasers, Avengers: Doomsday finally has a real trailer.

item.title: 'A high-performing endurance watch that operates wonderfully' — the Garmin Epix Pro (2nd Gen) crashes to $549.99 at Best Buy
item.description: If you're looking for a highly-rated sports watch, then the Garmin Epix Pro (2nd Gen) for $549.99 at Best Buy is an absolute steal.

item.title: Samsung fait entrer 34 nouvelles œuvres du Louvre, dont la Joconde, sur ses téléviseurs
item.description: Samsung Electronics annonce l'arrivée de 34 nouvelles œuvres issues du musée du Louvre sur l'Art Store, portant à 51 le nombre total d'œuvres du Louvre désormais accessibles dans le monde entier.

item.title: LibreOffice says Microsoft 'lock-in' with Office files is hurting users around the globe
item.description: Enterprises and agencies looking to adopt open source software alternative are struggling to ditch XML formats.

item.title: Après le scandale Siri, Apple glisse un micro au Genius Bar
item.description: Apple testerait dans quelques Apple Store un système d'IA baptisé Live Notes, capable d'enregistrer et de résumer vos échanges avec les techniciens. Les garanties annoncées sont nombreuses. Les zones d'ombre, aussi.

item.title: Jusqu’à 850 € d’économie : la TVA sur les climatiseurs réversibles chute enfin à 5,5 %
item.description: L'installation d’un climatiseur (pompe à chaleur réversible) coûte désormais beaucoup moins cher. Depuis le 18 juillet dernier, ces équipements bénéficient d'un taux de TVA réduit à 5,5 % au lieu de 20 %. Une mesure qui permet de réaliser des économies significatives, à condition toutefois de choisir un modèle éligible.

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch Ultra 2 leaks, see the sleek new wearable
item.description: Samsung's new high-end smartwatch feels more real than ever thanks to some leaked renders.

item.title: Hackers stole ‘significant’ amount of data from tech firm relied on by thousands of US hospitals and pharmacies
item.description: Edinburgh-based tech firm Craneware said customer data was stolen during a cyberattack. The company makes software that thousands of U.S. hospitals, pharmacies, and clinics rely on for billing patients, potentially exposing health data.

item.title: Dr. Jill Lepore on why AI backlash is vital for the future
item.description: Today, I’m talking with Harvard professor and New Yorker staff writer Dr. Jill Lepore about her new book, The Rise and Fall of the Artificial State, which comes out on August 25. Jill is one of the best writers there is at identifying institutional patterns in history, and Decoder is a show about systems, so […]

item.title: Avatar Aang: The Last Airbender should be released in IMAX rather than on Paramount+ — the jaw-dropping animation is easily the best part of the hero's return
item.description: 13 years after the Fire Nation's defeat, the gang is back together. But when the best part of Avatar Aang: The Last Airbender is its animation, Paramount+ isn't getting the best out of it.

item.title: Un pare-soleil qui produit de l’électricité : le surprenant accessoire d’EcoFlow pour Tesla
item.description: EcoFlow lance HeatGuard, un film solaire à coller sur le toit vitré des Tesla Model 3 et Y, annoncé aux alentours de 683 € pour la version Model Y. Le panneau recharge une batterie solaire portable de la marque, et non la batterie de la voiture.

item.title: Les TV OLED, QLED et même RGB Mini LED sont à prix cassés pour la fin des soldes d’été
item.description: Les TV 4K sont à l'honneur pour la fin des soldes d'été ! OLED aux noirs infinis, RGB Mini-LED ultra-lumineux, écrans géants ou modèles pas chers : il y en a absolument pour tous les goûts et tous les budgets. Voici notre sélection des 10 meilleures offres !

item.title: I wore the Samsung Galaxy XR headset for a whole work week, and it’s so close to greatness — but the head strap lets it down
item.description: One extreme week with the Samsung Galaxy XR — it’s so close to greatness, but I need a better head strap.

item.title: The AirPods Max 2 are down to their second-best price
item.description: There are a ton of deals available to shop today thanks to Best Buy’s “Black Friday in July” sale lasting all week. The sale typically aligns closely with Prime Day each year, but of course, Amazon’s shopping holiday happened much earlier than we expected. So it’s nice to have some deals in July. One of […]

item.title: I've found the 45 top tech deals in the Best Buy Black Friday in July sale — get up to 50% off Apple, LG, Nintendo, Garmin, and more
item.description: The Best Buy Black Friday in July sale is now live, so I've picked the best deals across TVs, appliances, laptops, headphones, wearables, and more.

item.title: Its hot outside. Train indoors on the Peloton Tread while its $400 off.
item.description: The Peloton Tread is on sale at Amazon for $2,895, down from the list price of $3,295. That's a 12% discount.

item.title: Watch Flock Safety CEO Garrett Langley discuss the future of surveillance at TechCrunch Disrupt 2026
item.description: Flock Safety sits right at the center of the debate over where the line should be drawn between privacy and public safety. That’s why we’re bringing Flock’s founder and CEO Garrett Langley to the stage to speak about those very issues.

item.title: Daisy’s first headphones sold out fast — here’s why everyone’s talking about them
item.description: A new headphone brand just sold out its first run. Here’s why Daisy One is catching the attention of audio fans.
